vulnerabilities.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. This header controls how much referrer information is sent with requests, protecting user privacy.
Permissions-Policy header is missing. This header controls which browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) the page can use.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Permissions-Policy header. Example: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

vulnerabilities.description: Server header exposes server software: 'Apple'. Attackers can use this to find known vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities.fix: Remove or obfuscate the Server header in your web server configuration.
Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.
Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.

vulnerabilities.description: Path '/robots.txt' is publicly accessible (HTTP 200). This may expose sensitive data or admin interfaces.
vulnerabilities.fix: Restrict access to '/robots.txt' using authentication, firewall rules, or server configuration. Remove unnecessary files.

vulnerabilities.description: Path '/sitemap.xml' is publicly accessible (HTTP 200). This may expose sensitive data or admin interfaces.
vulnerabilities.fix: Restrict access to '/sitemap.xml' using authentication, firewall rules, or server configuration. Remove unnecessary files.

vulnerabilities.description: Found 7 subdomains: www.apple.com, app.apple.com, portal.apple.com, support.apple.com, shop.apple.com, store.apple.com, mobile.apple.com. Each subdomain increases the attack surface.
vulnerabilities.fix: Audit all subdomains. Ensure unused subdomains are removed and all active ones are secured.
